headline: Capital One Investors Reject Golden Parachute Proposal As Risks Stay In Focus
summary: Shareholders at Capital One Financial's (NYSE:COF) recent annual meeting voted on a proxy proposal addressing golden parachute arrangements for executives. The proposal, which sought changes to these change of control compensation provisions, was not approved. For investors watching Capital One Financial at a share price of $186.66, this vote adds useful context around how current executive pay structures are being viewed. The stock is up 96.0% over the past 3 years and 26.5% over the past...
